title: Chemical periodicity of other elements
summary: 9701 AS — transition metals, catalysis, and periodic trends beyond Period 3 with PhET build-an-atom.
learningObjectives: Explain catalytic behaviour of transition metals.

simpleExplanation.title: Beyond Period 3
simpleExplanation.summary: Transition metals show variable oxidation states and form coloured ions. Many industrial catalysts are transition metal compounds.
steps: Partially filled d orbitals — similar radii across row.
Fe catalyst in Haber; V₂O₅ in Contact process.
Compare with s- and p-block trends studied earlier.

sections.content: **Chemical periodicity of other elements** (9.3) rounds off topic 9. Link **electronic structure** to **catalysis** and **colour**.
